Echo Step.description:
Mechanics:
Passive with 2 Active Uses per Short Rest. 

As a reaction or bonus action, Syric steps into the Shadowfold for a fraction of a second, gaining a glimpse of multiple possible outcomes before choosing the most favorable one.

**Daily Use:**

Syric can pause time for himself for a brief moment (does not stop the world, just his ability to act).
While inside the Shadowfold, he gains Advantage on Investigation and Insight checks, as he can see faint echoes of past actions or sense how people might respond to certain words or choices.
He can also make a Wisdom (Perception) check with Advantage to foresee an immediate danger, such as a trap triggering, a hidden enemy moving, or someone about to lie.

**Combat Use:** all once per long rest
Reaction – Flicker Dodge: 
When attacked, Syric can briefly phase out, forcing the enemy to reroll the attack once.
Bonus Action – Echoing Strike:
When Syric lands an attack or casts a spell, he can “rewind” his action and choose a different target, as if he had taken an alternate approach.
Reaction: 
If Syric fails a Dexterity saving throw, he can step into the Shadowfold, allowing him to reroll the save with Advantage before snapping back into place.

Visual Effect: 
Time slows slightly, and shadowy afterimages of Syric flicker around him, each representing different choices he could make before the correct one solidifies.

Arcane Recovery.description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover - up to a combined level of 6, and none of the slots can be 6th level or higher.

Nyx Blessing.description: As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 ft. to an unoccupied space you can see. Starting at 3rd level, you gain resistance to all damage until the start of your next turn. You can use this feature 3 times per long rest.

Void Anchor.description: When you would be knocked prone, pushed, pulled, or forcibly moved, you may choose to remain perfectly still.

Sovereign Silence.description: Reaction. When you or anyone within 10ft are targeted with a spell requiring verbal components, invoke the ring to cause the spell to fail as though the sound never existed.

Void Reprisal.description: Reaction. When hit by an attack, the attacker makes DC18 CON save or takes 4d8 force damage (half on success). Ignores resistance to force damage.

Comprehend Languages.name: Comprehend Languages
Comprehend Languages.description:
For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. You also understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text.

This spell doesn't decode secret messages in a text or a glyph, such as an arcane sigil, that isn't part of a written language.

Rune Shaper.name: Rune Shaper
Rune Shaper.description:
Rune Magic:
You know a number of runes equal to half your proficiency bonus (rounded down), chosen from the Rune Spells table. Whenever you finish a long rest, you can inscribe each rune you know onto one nonmagical weapon, armor, piece of clothing, or other object you touch.

You temporarily learn the 1st-level spells that correspond to the runes you inscribed, as specified on the Rune Spells table, and you know those spells until you finish a long rest, when the runes fade. While you are wearing or carrying any rune-marked object, you can cast the spells associated with those runes using any spell slots you have.

Rune Invocation:
You can also invoke a rune inscribed on an object you are wearing or carrying and cast its associated spell without expending a spell slot or using material components. Once you cast the spell in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a long rest.

Spellcasting Ability: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma (choose when you select this feat).

Rune Advancement:
Each time you gain a level, you can replace one of the runes you know with another one from the Rune Spells table.

Rune Spells:
┌─────────────┬──────────────────┐
│    Rune     │      Spell       │
├─────────────┼──────────────────┤
│ Cloud       │ Fog cloud        │
│ Death       │ Inflict wounds   │
│ Dragon      │ Chromatic orb    │
│ Enemy       │ Disguise self    │
│ Fire        │ Burning hands    │
│ Friend      │ Speak with animals│
│ Frost       │ Armor of Agathys │
│ Hill        │ Goodberry        │
│ Journey     │ Longstrider      │
│ King        │ Command          │
│ Mountain    │ Entangle         │
│ Stone       │ Sanctuary        │
│ Storm       │ Thunderwave      │
└─────────────┴──────────────────┘

Minor Conjuration.name: Minor Conjuration
Minor Conjuration.description: You can use your action to conjure up an inanimate object (no larger than 3 ft. on a side and weigh no more than 10 lb.) in your hand or in an unoccupied space that you can reach. The object disappears after 1 hour, when you use this feature again, or if it takes or deals any damage.

Pass Without Trace.name: Pass Without Trace
Pass Without Trace.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For the duration, each creature you choose within 30 feet of you (including you) has a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and can’t be tracked except by magical means. A creature that receives this bonus leaves behind no tracks or other traces of its passage.

Free Upcast (Codex P3).name: Free Upcast (Codex P3)
Free Upcast (Codex P3).description:
Mastery — Deepening the Connection (Page 3).

USES: 2/long rest at L11-16. (1 at L1-10. 3 at L17-20, each use may upcast by up to 2 levels.)

EFFECT: Upcast any spell by one level for free. Cannot exceed a spell level for which Syric has slots. The original non-upcast slot is consumed.

EXAMPLE: Cast Fireball at 4th level for free even if all 4th-level slots are used — but a 3rd-level slot must be available and is consumed.

Seamless Casting (Codex P4 NO V/S).name: Seamless Casting (Codex P4 NO V/S)
Seamless Casting (Codex P4 NO V/S).description:
Runic Flow — Magic as Natural Extension (Page 4).

USES: 2/long rest at L11-16. (1 at L1-10. 3 at L17-20.)

EFFECT: Cast one spell from one of Syric's inscribed runes without verbal or somatic components. Material components remain normal — a spellcasting focus covers non-costly materials; costly or consumed materials still required. Spell otherwise resolves normally.

NOTE: Does not count as a strain effect. Does not change slot economy. Can share a round with other actions under normal limits.

Overload System (Codex P2).name: Overload System (Codex P2)
Overload System (Codex P2).description:
Inscription — Binding Magic to Flesh (Page 2). PASSIVE SYSTEM — tap to reference.

INSCRIBING A RUNE
Time: 1 hour per spell level. Cantrips: 30 minutes.
Required Check: Arcana check. DC = 10 + spell level.
Success: Spell inscribed as a rune.
Failure: Rune is unstable, cannot be used until long rest.

ARCANE CHARGE
Each time Syric casts a leveled spell, he gains Arcane Charge equal to the spell's level. Shadow-cast spells using Syric's slots count. Reaction spells expending a leveled slot count normally. Charge resets to 0 when it naturally dissipates, is fully vented, or Arcane Discharge occurs.

ARCANE CAPACITY (THRESHOLD): Equal to Syric's Arcana Bonus (10 at L13). Dynamic — updates automatically.
Charge CAN exceed the threshold — the threshold is when consequences begin, not a hard cap.

NATURAL DISSIPATION
End of turn: auto-reduce by minimum possible Vent Die value (2 at L11-16 with 2d6).
If no leveled spell cast that round: fully discharge at max Vent Die value (12 at L11-16 with 2d6).

VENT DIE SCALING: L5-10 = 1d6 | L11-16 = 2d6 | L17-20 = 3d6

OVERLOAD STATE TRIGGER
Arcane Charge equals or exceeds Arcane Capacity (Arcana Bonus). Entering Overload State does NOT immediately force a check.
Once in Overload State, casting another leveled spell triggers an Overload Check.

OVERLOAD CHECK
Arcana check. DC = current Arcane Charge total.
SUCCESS: Maintain control. Remain in Overload State.
FAILURE: Arcane Discharge occurs.

OVERLOAD STATE ENDS
If Arcane Charge drops below Arcane Capacity, Overload ends immediately. Charge is retained.

ARCANE DISCHARGE (on failed Overload Check)
20-foot radius centered on Syric. Damage = 2x stored spell levels (force).
DEX save for half (DC = Syric's spell save DC). Syric auto-fails, takes full damage.
After Effect: Roll Arcane Rebound d120 table. Charge resets to 0.

ARCANE VENTING (Bonus Action)
Roll Vent Die (2d6 at L11-16), reduce Arcane Charge by result. Min charge 0.

END OF TURN INSTABILITY
After passive discharge, if charge still >= Arcane Capacity, must immediately make Overload Check.

Shadow: Core Reference.name: Shadow: Core Reference
Shadow: Core Reference.description:
Shadow Level 13 Reference.

CORE STATS
AC 15; HP = 1/2 Syric max HP, rounded down; PB +5.
Size/Form: Default Tiny; Umbral Predator; Large max physical size; CR 3 appearance/form cap.
Movement: Walk/Hover 45 ft.; Fly 55 ft. (hover); Climb 45 ft.
Darkvision: 120 ft.; sees through magical darkness.
Saves: Dex +8; Con +6; Wis +7; Int uses Syric when appropriate.
Skills: Stealth +11 table formula; Perception +7; advantage on sight/hearing checks in dim light or darkness. Legacy approved Stealth +15 may be used as a floor if DM prefers.
Senses/Bond: Darkvision 120 ft.; Shared Senses 1,000 ft.; Spell Delivery 300 ft..
Manifest Load: Carry 75 lb.; lift/drag/push 150 lb..

CORE RULES
Shadow is Syric's will, senses, magic, and survival instinct given form. Shadow amplifies Syric, not replaces him.
Voidshape grants appearance, anatomy, movement logic, and roleplay utility only. It never grants monster stat blocks, traits, spellcasting, legendary actions, recharge powers, or full Multiattack.
Shadowmeld: Bonus Action to merge into Syric's shadow. Immune to all effects while merged; cannot act; maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.
Umbral Shift: Bonus Action to shift between Corporeal Form and Shadow Form.
Corporeal Form: interact with objects, block space, grapple/shove if shape has leverage, speak through suitable shape, be targeted normally, and use Void Rend.
Shadow Form: hover, slip through openings a gas could fit, hide in dim light/darkness/natural shadow, ignore nonmagical difficult terrain, deliver/originate spells where features allow. Cannot make physical attacks unless a feature allows.
Damage Rules: Corporeal: resist cold, necrotic, psychic, and nonmagical B/P/S. Shadow Form: immune to all damage except radiant, fire, and lightning. Vulnerable to radiant, fire, and lightning.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, unconscious.

Shadow: Shadowmeld.name: Shadow: Shadowmeld
Shadow: Shadowmeld.description:
Shadow Level 13 Shadowmeld.

Bonus Action: merge into Syric's shadow. While merged, Shadow is immune to all effects, cannot act, and maintains telepathy. Shadowmeld is defensive/inactive; it is not Shadow Form.

Shadow: Party Warding.name: Shadow: Party Warding
Shadow: Party Warding.description:
Shadow Level 13 Party Warding.

Allies within 60 ft. of Shadow gain advantage on Initiative and cannot be surprised by threats Shadow can perceive. This does not reveal hidden creatures or bypass total cover.

Shadow: Party Warding Shield.name: Shadow: Party Warding Shield
Shadow: Party Warding Shield.description:
Shadow Level 13 Party Warding Shield.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Reaction: Shadow may cast Shield on an ally within 30 ft. of Shadow.
Effect: +5 AC until the end of Shadow's next turn.
Allies only; this does not target Syric.

Shadow: Syric Channeling.name: Shadow: Syric Channeling
Shadow: Syric Channeling.description:
Shadow Level 13 Syric Channeling.

Syric may cast eligible prepared spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot. Range and line of sight may originate from Shadow within current Spell Delivery range (300 ft.).
Actual spells delivered or released through Shadow use Syric's spell attack bonus and spell save DC. Normal spell rules remain unless a feature modifies them.

ECHO CONDUIT
Echoed Rune may originate from Shadow's space. No new save. No new attack roll. No copied conditions, summons, teleportation, or ongoing zones unless a feature specifically allows it.

RUNE IMPRINT
Shadow may leave a shadow-rune on a surface within Shared Senses range (1,000 ft.). Syric may shift senses to it as a sensory anchor. Duration: 8 hours or until dismissed, erased, or suppressed.

Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast.name: Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast
Shadow: Nightbound Shadowcast.description:
Shadow Level 13 Nightbound Shadowcast.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Cap: 3rd-level spell.
During meditative preparation, Syric stores one known wizard spell in Shadow up to the level cap; it does not need to be prepared. Syric spends the slot during preparation. Shadow releases it later with Shadow's bonus action.
It is Syric's magic held in Shadow, not Shadow learning magic.
The stored spell follows Syric's spell attack bonus, spell save DC, and all normal spell restrictions unless another Shadow feature modifies delivery or action economy.

Shadow: Void Rend.name: Shadow: Void Rend
Shadow: Void Rend.description:
Shadow Level 13 Void Rend.

Melee spell attack feature, not a spell. Requires Corporeal Form. Uses Syric's spell attack bonus. Cannot be Counterspelled. Counts as magical damage.
On hit: 2d8; Action — necrotic, radiant, or force, chosen by Syric each time it hits.
Shadow does not make multiple Void Rends unless a feature specifically says so.

Shadow: Reactive Link.name: Shadow: Reactive Link
Shadow: Reactive Link.description:
Shadow Level 13 Reactive Link.

Uses: 1/short rest.
Trigger: when Syric is hit, targeted by a spell attack, or forced to make a saving throw.
Reaction: Shadow grants Syric +5 AC and advantage on saving throws for 1d4 rounds.
Cost: Shadow loses HP equal to twice Syric's PB. At this level, PB is +5, so the HP cost is 10.

Shadow: Flicker Defense.name: Shadow: Flicker Defense
Shadow: Flicker Defense.description:
Shadow Level 13 Flicker Defense.

Uses: floor(PB÷2)/long rest. At this level, uses = 2.
Trigger: Shadow is hit while in Corporeal Form.
Reaction: Shadow makes a Dexterity save against the triggering attack roll.
Success: no damage and Shadow shifts to Shadow Form.
Failure: Shadow takes the damage, then shifts to Shadow Form.

Shadow: Held Touch Spell.name: Shadow: Held Touch Spell
Shadow: Held Touch Spell.description:
Shadow Level 13 Held Touch Spell.

 Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may hold one prepared touch spell and deliver it later as an action, reaction, or bonus action within range. This remains separate from Nightbound Shadowcast.

Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery.name: Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery
Shadow: Limited Ranged Delivery.description:
Shadow Level 13 Limited Ranged Delivery.

Uses: 2/long rest.
Shadow may deliver one ranged spell using Shadow's action and Syric's spell slot. Max spell level follows the Nightbound Shadowcast table cap for this level (3rd-level).
Range and line of sight originate from Shadow within 300 ft..
Baseline Syric Channeling still exists separately: Syric may also cast eligible ranged spells through Shadow using Syric's action and spell slot.

Shadow: Shadow Step.name: Shadow: Shadow Step
Shadow: Shadow Step.description:
Shadow Level 13 Shadow Step.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may teleport to Syric's shadow or one of Shadow's Rune Imprints on the same plane, or swap places with Syric within 60 ft.

Shadow: Dimensional Echo.name: Shadow: Dimensional Echo
Shadow: Dimensional Echo.description:
Shadow Level 13 Dimensional Echo.

Uses: 1/long rest.
Shadow may record up to 1 minute of sights and sounds it perceives and replay them telepathically to Syric.

Echoed Rune (Codex P5).name: Echoed Rune (Codex P5)
Echoed Rune (Codex P5).description:
The Price of Power — Echoed Rune (Page 5).

USES: 1/long rest at L13. (2 at L15. 3 at L17.)

TRIGGER: After Syric casts an inscribed rune spell that damages at least one creature.

ACTIVATION: Bonus action after original spell resolves.

COST: Spend one spell slot equal to half the original slot level rounded down (min 1st-level), PLUS Codex Dice equal to the original spell's level. If the original spell was a cantrip, no slot cost.

EFFECT: No new save. No new attack roll. Auto-deals half the original spell's rolled damage (rounded down) to same targets. Uses original damage type.

EXAMPLE: Spell deals 40 damage → Echo deals 20 damage automatically.

Veil (Codex P6).name: Veil (Codex P6)
Veil (Codex P6).description:
Duality of Runes — Veil (Page 6).

USES: 2/long rest (half PB rounded down; PB=5 at L13).

COST: 1d12 psychic damage to hide runes. If kept hidden past 4 hours, 1d12 psychic again per additional 4 hours.

DURATION: 4 hours, then runes reveal unless extended.

EFFECT WHILE VEILED:
• Runes do not visibly glow. Normal sight cannot see rune flare.
• Detect Magic senses magic but not exact rune locations.
• Truesight / True Seeing still sees runes.
• +10 to Stealth checks (as Pass Without Trace).
• Advantage on first spell attack roll, OR impose disadvantage on first save against one of Syric's spell save DCs.

Reveal (Codex P6).name: Reveal (Codex P6)
Reveal (Codex P6).description:
Duality of Runes — Reveal (Page 6).

USES: 1/short rest.

ACTIVATION: Free action. Intentionally reveal hidden runes, causing them to visibly glow.

EFFECT: Syric may use his Arcana skill as the modifier for one Intimidation or Persuasion check. The sudden display unsettles, impresses, or unnerves the target.

spell_list: Protection from Evil and Good (2 charges)

Viel Twilight Mind (DMG Boost).description: twice per long rest: 1d12 + prof bonus

Arcane Charge.name: Arcane Charge
Arcane Charge.description:
Inscription (Page 2). BUILDING COUNTER — auto-increments when spell slots are spent.

Gains Arcane Charge equal to spell level cast. Shadow-cast spells using Syric's slots also count. Reaction spells that expend a leveled slot count normally.

ARCANE CAPACITY (THRESHOLD): Arcana Bonus (10 at L13). Dynamic — recalculates when Tracker tab redraws.
Charge CAN exceed this threshold — it marks when Overload State begins, not a hard cap.

OVERLOAD STATE: Triggered when charge equals or exceeds Arcane Capacity. Does NOT immediately force a check.
While in Overload State, casting another leveled spell immediately triggers an Overload Check.

OVERLOAD CHECK: Arcana check. DC = 10 + current Arcane Charge total.
SUCCESS: Maintain control. Remain in Overload State.
FAILURE: Arcane Discharge occurs.

OVERLOAD STATE ENDS: If charge drops below Arcane Capacity, Overload ends immediately. Charge is retained.

ARCANE DISCHARGE (on failed check):
20-foot radius centered on Syric. Damage = 2x stored spell levels (force).
DEX save for half (DC = Syric's spell save DC). Syric auto-fails, takes full damage.
After Effect: Roll Arcane Rebound d100 table. Charge resets to 0.

ARCANE VENTING (Bonus Action): Roll Vent Die (2d6 at L11-16), subtract result from charge. Min charge 0.
PASSIVE DISCHARGE (end of turn): Reduce by minimum Vent Die value (2 at L11-16).
MAX DISSIPATION: If no leveled spell cast that round, discharge at max Vent Die value (12 at L11-16).
END OF TURN INSTABILITY: After passive discharge, if charge still >= threshold, immediately make Overload Check.

VENT DIE SCALING: L5-10 = 1d6 | L11-16 = 2d6 | L17-20 = 3d6

RST button = zero out on Discharge or end of combat.

Codex Dice (Codex P5).name: Codex Dice (Codex P5)
Codex Dice (Codex P5).description:
The Price of Power — Codex Surge (Page 5).

POOL: 10 Codex Dice at L13-16. (6 at L5-8, 8 at L9-12, 12 at L17-19, 14 at L20.) Regain all after long rest.

TRIGGER: After casting an inscribed rune spell that damages one or more creatures.

FREE ACTION (d6): No action cost. Spend up to proficiency bonus dice (5 at L13).
BONUS ACTION (d12): Dice become d12s. No limit on dice used.

Damage type matches the spell. Does not work with scrolls.
